name: dao-pcb
displayName: DAO PCB — 归一工作台 (KiCad + 嘉立创EDA)
description: KiCad and LCEDA (嘉立创EDA) unified in your IDE on the Devin Desktop base: dual bridges, Proxy Pro style four-mode prompt shaping (native/dao/kicad/lceda), domain tools natively injected alongside official tools via MCP.

commands.title: DAO PCB: 打开归一工作台 (Open Home)
DAO PCB: 重启双桥 (Restart Bridges)
DAO PCB: 挂载 KiCad 底座引擎 (Mount Engine)
DAO PCB: 循环切换四态 原生/道/KiCad/嘉立创EDA (Toggle Mode)
DAO PCB: 选择模式 (Pick Mode)
PCB · AI: 聚焦 Cascade 三模式面板
PCB · AI: 新建 Cascade 会话
PCB · AI: Cascade 历史会话
PCB · AI: DeepWiki 解释选中符号

daoPcb.kicadEnginePath.description: Path to the dao_kicad engine folder (contains daokicad/ and bridge/). Empty = auto-detect in workspace.

daoPcb.lcedaBridgePath.description: Path to the folder containing lceda bridge_server.py. Empty = auto-detect lceda_bridge/vscode_lceda in workspace.

daoPcb.python.description: Python interpreter used to run both bridge servers.

daoPcb.kicadPort.description: Localhost port for the KiCad bridge REST service.

daoPcb.lcedaPort.description: Localhost port for the LCEDA bridge REST service.

daoPcb.cdpPorts.description: Candidate CDP ports probed to attach the LCEDA client/browser.

daoPcb.preferLocalEda.description: Prefer the locally installed LCEDA client over the web version.

daoPcb.lcedaPanelMode.description: LCEDA tab content: shell (unified tabs), native (local EDA screencast), screencast (canvas panel).
